## Privacy check

- [ ] No real names, contact details, or practice data in code, tests, fixtures, or commit messages
- [ ] Fictional data uses placeholder names (`Max Mustermann`, `AB-1`, `mail@example.com`)

## Testing

- [ ] `./dev.py quality` passes (ruff format + lint + tests)
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by a test, or existing tests still pass
